findings.description: The NC Energy, Mineral & Land Resources logo/image present in the PDF header is missing or not rendered properly in the HTML version.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the NC state logo with tree graphic and 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources / ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY' text. HTML page 1 shows only a colored bar without the logo image.

findings.description: The outline list numbering format differs between PDF and HTML. PDF uses Roman numerals with periods aligned in a column layout, while HTML renders them as a standard list.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'I.', 'II.', 'III.', 'IV.' with tab-aligned descriptions. HTML shows similar but with hyperlinks added to the items.

findings.description: Page 2 of the PDF is essentially a blank letterhead page, but the HTML conversion skips this entirely and continues with content from page 3.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows only the NC letterhead with no body content. HTML does not have a corresponding blank page.

findings.description: The NC state logo present on PDF page 2 letterhead is missing from the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows the full NC logo header. HTML has no corresponding blank page with logo.

findings.description: Bullet style differences between PDF and HTML in the CAMA process list on page 3.
findings.evidence: PDF uses open circle bullets (•) for the CAMA process list items. HTML uses filled disc bullets.

findings.description: The attachment list numbering in section IV uses Roman numerals in both versions but the attachment labeling in the body text references 'Attachment I' and 'Attachment II' which is consistent.
findings.evidence: Both versions maintain the same numbering scheme for attachments.

findings.description: Governor's name has a capitalization error in the HTML header
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'PAT McCRORY' but HTML shows 'PAT McCrORY'

findings.description: The alt text for the logo image is reasonable but describes it as a logo when it likely also includes letterhead formatting with the names/titles. The description is acceptable but not fully precise.
findings.evidence: alt='NC DEQ Energy, Mineral and Land Resources logo' — the image in the PDF is a letterhead header block including the NC logo and agency name.
